name: isubscribe-entitlements-monorepo
description: Monorepo for @idevconn/entitlements npm package and example apps

scripts.build: npm run build -w @idevconn/isubscribe-entitlements && npm run build -w example-nest-api && npm run build -w example-react
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @idevconn/isubscribe-entitlements && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.start:dev:nest: npm run build -w @idevconn/isubscribe-entitlements && npm run start:dev -w example-nest-api
scripts.start:dev:react: npm run build -w @idevconn/isubscribe-entitlements && npm run start:dev -w example-react
